DP.276.0000:
[0103,0000]: !\f
You’re not getting away with this,
Team Galactic!\f
DP.276.0001:
Jupiter: Oh?
Are you finished already?\f
Your Pokémon aren’t bad, but you’re
laughably weak.\f
You honestly thought you could save
the Pokémon of the lake?\f
And become the Pokémon Champion?
Dream on, little kid.\f
But, eww, it’s so cold here.
Let’s go back to the Veilstone HQ.\f
DP.276.0002:
Oh? Don’t I know you?
We met in Eterna City.\f
Listen. Team Galactic is going to do
something huge for everyone’s sake.\f
That’s why you should keep out of
Team Galactic’s way.\f
Don’t come whining about poor Pokémon
and other trivial junk like that.\f
Don’t waste your time coming to our
HQ in Veilstone.\f
Now, if you’ll excuse me.\f
DP.276.0003:
[0103,0000]: ...
...\f
Yeah, that’s right!\f
I couldn’t do anything against Team
Galactic!\f
DP.276.0004:
That Pokémon called UXIE...
It was suffering...\f
DP.276.0005:
I’m going to get tougher...\f
It’s not about winning or losing...
That’s not good enough...\r
I have to be stronger...\f
